page_content:
Recommended: ECON200.

Credit Only Granted for: ECON201 or ECON205.

ECON230 Applied Economic Statistics (3 Credits)

Introductory course to develop understanding of statistical concepts used in applied economics. Students will acquire skills needed to calculate and interpret statistical concepts, including descriptive statistics, probability, discrete and continuous distributions, sampling, point and interval estimations, hypothesis testing, basic analysis
